issues.summary: Rebuild BrainAppWeb as an Angular application
issues.description:
Goal: build an Angular application that reproduces the authenticated BrainApp at https://brainappweb.vercel.app/ using the supplied Supabase project and credentials.

Definition of done:
- All child feature tickets are complete and linked to this epic.
- Responsive desktop/mobile behavior and dark mode match the original closely.
- Existing user data remains compatible; no destructive schema migration is introduced.
- Authentication, row-level ownership, CRUD behavior, loading/error/empty states, and deployment are verified.
- Secrets are never committed; browser code receives only the Supabase URL and anon key.

issues.summary: Document authenticated UX, routes, and parity checklist
issues.description:
Sign in to the original app with the configured test account and document its navigation, pages, dialogs, forms, validation, responsive behavior, dark mode, empty/loading/error states, and key user journeys. Map each screen to its Supabase tables.

Acceptance criteria:
- A route/screen inventory and parity checklist exist in the repository.
- Unknown behaviors and destructive operations are explicitly recorded.
- Screenshots or visual references cover desktop and mobile layouts without exposing private data.

issues.summary: Scaffold the Angular app, architecture, and design system
issues.description: Create Angular routing, typed environments, Supabase client, shared responsive shell, forms, icons, notifications, themes, loading/error/empty states, and PWA metadata. Acceptance: dev and production builds pass and no privileged secret reaches browser code.

issues.summary: Implement Supabase authentication and protected routing
issues.description: Reproduce email/password login, session restore, auth guards, expiration handling, logout, and no-public-signup behavior. Acceptance: valid/invalid login, refresh, expiry, redirects, loading and error states match the original.

issues.summary: Build the application shell, dashboard, and user settings
issues.description: Recreate navigation, dashboard widgets/configuration, profiles, preferences, body visibility/height, theme, and push-subscription UI using profiles, user_settings and push_subscriptions. Acceptance: settings persist and all modules remain usable on mobile.

issues.summary: Implement notes, lists, reminders, and priorities
issues.description: Recreate notes and note_lists CRUD, content modes, tags, done state, list assignment, ordering, reminders, priorities, search/filter and confirmations. Acceptance: all behavior persists per user and handles empty lists and deletes.

issues.summary: Implement habits, daily checks, and streaks
issues.description: Recreate habits, habit_checks and habit_streaks with colors, date ranges, ordering/collapse, daily checks, streaks, sport metrics and workout/training-plan links. Acceptance: checks and streaks remain correct across dates.

issues.summary: Implement sports workouts and custom sport types
issues.description: Recreate workouts, workout_stats, custom_sport_types and personal_records with conditional distance, duration, pace, heart-rate, elevation, reps and stationary fields. Acceptance: CRUD, units, validation, statistics and records work for every sport configuration.

issues.summary: Implement CrossFit workout library and result tracking
issues.description: Recreate workouts_library and CrossFit logging: AMRAP, time caps, rounds, intervals, reps, DNF, missing reps, hero/girl/open/partner flags and favourites. Acceptance: library items populate logs and all result variants render correctly.

issues.summary: Implement exercises, equipment, and training plans
issues.description: Recreate exercises, equipment and training_plans with capability flags, associations, ordered plan exercises, duration and workout logging. Acceptance: CRUD works, capability flags drive forms, and plans integrate with workouts and habits.

issues.summary: Implement Greasing the Groove tracking
issues.description: Recreate greasing_the_groove_days and exercises: start a day, choose exercises, accumulate reps and link the sport workout. Acceptance: daily totals persist, duplicates are prevented, and linked workout data stays consistent.

issues.summary: Implement nutrition diary and nutrition goals
issues.description: Recreate diet_meals, diet_settings and history with date navigation, meal CRUD, calories, protein, fat, carbs, fiber, salt and goal progress. Acceptance: totals/rounding are correct and goal changes preserve history.

issues.summary: Implement recipes and meal-prep features
issues.description: Recreate recipes with ingredients, preparation, nutrition, servings, prep time, rating, image, tips, meal-prep and favourite states. Acceptance: CRUD, details, search/filter and favourites work with fallbacks for optional images/fields.

issues.summary: Implement body measurements, goals, history, and milestones
issues.description: Recreate measurements, goals, goal history, milestones, charting and visibility preferences. Acceptance: CRUD and progress calculations handle sparse values, goal changes create history, and privacy preferences are honored.

issues.summary: Implement grocery lists and sharing
issues.description: Recreate grocery_lists, items and shares with multiple lists, completion, sharing/unsharing by user/email, owner and recipient views. Acceptance: permission boundaries hold and list/item/share CRUD and timestamps work.

issues.summary: Implement journal entries and calendar navigation
issues.description: Recreate dated journal_entries CRUD, calendar/date navigation and content presentation. Acceptance: multiline entries, locale formatting, empty days, save feedback and delete confirmation match the original.

issues.summary: Implement configurable rankings and consumed history
issues.description: Recreate ranking categories, rankings and consumed dates with configurable fields/views, ratings, status, metadata, media, episodes, nutrition and history. Acceptance: category settings control UI and CRUD/filter/sort/progress all work.

issues.summary: Implement flashcard categories and study cards
issues.description: Recreate flashcard_categories and flashcards with category/card CRUD, titles, front/back content, filters and study reveal flow. Acceptance: deletion dependencies, empty categories, keyboard/mobile use and per-user scope work.

issues.summary: Implement stretching routines and exercise media
issues.description: Recreate stretching routines and ordered exercises with emoji, duration timer, notes and image URLs. Acceptance: CRUD/reordering, guided timing, next/previous controls, interruption and broken images are handled.

issues.summary: Implement line-dance catalogue and step sheets
issues.description: Recreate linedance dances and ordered steps with YouTube URL, count, walls, difficulty, notes and foot annotations. Acceptance: CRUD, safe links, ordering and labels stay correct after edits/deletes.

issues.summary: Implement flag-football formations, routes, and playbook
issues.description: Recreate formations, route segments/aliases, plays, assignments and ordered playbook with flipping and numbering. Acceptance: CRUD and visual coordinates persist, flipping is deterministic, and invalid references/dependencies are handled.

issues.summary: Add automated parity, security, and accessibility tests
issues.description: Add unit, integration, E2E, visual parity and accessibility tests for auth and core CRUD. Acceptance: CI runs lint, types, tests and build; cross-user access is denied; fixtures/screenshots/logs contain no credentials or private data.

issues.summary: Configure PWA behavior and production deployment
issues.description: Configure production hosting, environment injection, SPA refresh routing, manifest/icons, installability, caching/updates and documentation. Acceptance: deployment smoke tests pass and only Supabase URL/anon key enter browser bundles.
